heading: API Documentation
body:
To learn more about any of the types or methods discussed in this guide, see the
following API documentation:

- [MongoClient](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/MongoClient.html)

- [Db](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Db.html)

- [Collection](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html)

- [insertOne()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html#insertOne)

- [insertMany()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html#insertMany)
